# plot_large_scale_characteristics { #cdmconnector.plot_large_scale_characteristics }

```python
plot_large_scale_characteristics(result, *, facet=None, colour=None)
```

Plot large-scale characteristics as a scatter plot of concept frequencies.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                         | Description   | Default    |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result | SummarisedResult from summarise_large_scale_characteristics. |               | _required_ |
| facet  | Column(s) to facet by.                                       |               | `None`     |
| colour | Column to colour by. Default \"variable_level\" (window).    |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                     | Description   |
|--------|--------------------------|---------------|
|        | matplotlib.figure.Figure |               |
